title: Maintenance rotation + review cadence + reuse/outcomes dashboard + new-biomarker process
context: Post-delivery sustainment: a named maintenance rotation, a runtime-enforced review cadence driven by lastVerified/validUntil, a reuse/outcomes dashboard (adoptions/citations/embeddings, not page views), and a gated process for adding new biomarkers. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Establish the maintenance rotation, review cadence (re-verification + re-sign-off driven by lastVerified/validUntil, register re-verified on cadence), reuse/outcomes dashboard, and a documented gated new-biomarker process (cite -> grade -> domain review -> [patient layer: oncologist + advocate]).
acceptanceCriteria: Named maintenance rotation; review cadence driven by lastVerified/validUntil (re-verification + re-sign-off); license register re-verified on a cadence
Reuse/outcomes dashboard tracks adoptions, citations of the cards, and embeddings in advocacy resources (not page views)
Documented, gated process for adding new biomarkers (cite -> grade -> domain review -> [patient layer: oncologist + advocate])
